field_values.description: OSF public project/component titled "Reproducibility Project - Psychology: Design" associated with the broader Reproducibility Project: Psychology. Surface file-list metadata for this specific component shows a PPTX presentation file, not a verified data table. The broader RP:P project conducted replications of 100 experimental and correlational studies published in three psychology journals.
field_values.why_relevant: Relevant as a root lead for the Reproducibility Project: Psychology source family because the broader project compares original and replication studies and reports reproducibility indicators. This specific i68pe Design component should be treated as a lead requiring OSF component/file inventory rather than as a directly parsed results dataset.
field_values.next_action: Inventory OSF node i68pe and its parent/related RP:P nodes through OSF files/components; inspect the surfaced PPTX only if it is needed for provenance context; follow the main RP:P project/data artifacts to locate actual tabular files and verify whether they contain effect statistics, sample sizes, original-replication pair mappings, and publication identifiers.
field_values.notes: Do not assert row counts, column names, or parser readiness from the landing page. Web-visible metadata indicates this component is real and public, but the only surfaced file-list item found for i68pe was a presentation file. Broader RP:P publication metadata supports relevance, not file-level extractability for this component.

field_basis.source_family: Landing URL and source_key identify an OSF project; web-visible OSF metadata titles it as "Reproducibility Project - Psychology: Design" and describes it as a public project/component.
field_basis.domain_or_field: The title names psychology, and the related RP:P publication is about reproducibility of psychological science.
field_basis.description: OSF metadata identifies the i68pe project/component title; OSF file-list search metadata surfaces "APS-presentation-RP-P-Design-LeBel.pptx"; related RP:P publication metadata states the broader project conducted replications of 100 experimental and correlational studies in three psychology journals.
field_basis.why_relevant: The broader RP:P publication reports original/replication comparison metrics, effect sizes, P values, subjective assessments, and meta-analysis; this makes the source family relevant for original-replication provenance, while i68pe itself still needs file-level inspection.
field_basis.result_fields_available: Unknown because no i68pe data artifact/table was inspected. Surface file-list metadata showed a PPTX presentation, and related publication text does not establish exact downloadable fields for this component.
field_basis.has_d_or_convertible_effect: Unknown for i68pe. Related RP:P publication reports effect sizes, but no extractable effect-size/statistic field was verified in files from this component.
field_basis.has_n: Unknown for i68pe. OSF/search metadata mentions sample size and power concepts, and the broader RP:P publication discusses sample size, but no extractable sample-size field was verified in this component.
field_basis.has_replication_pair_mapping: Unknown for i68pe. The broader RP:P project performed replications of 100 studies, but no original-replication pair mapping table was verified in this component.
field_basis.has_publication_links: Unknown for i68pe. A related Science publication DOI exists for the broader RP:P project, but row-level publication links or original article identifiers were not verified in this component.
field_basis.parser_family: The landing URL is an OSF project/component, so OSF project/file inventory is the appropriate first parser family. A file-type-specific parser cannot be assigned until actual artifacts are inspected.
field_basis.blocker_codes: The blocker is file/artifact inspection: surface metadata is insufficient, and the only surfaced i68pe file-list item was a PPTX rather than a verified data table.
field_basis.next_action: Next inspection must enumerate OSF files/components, check parent/related RP:P nodes, and only then inspect/download artifacts to verify fields and parser requirements.
field_basis.notes: OSF page content was limited in web-open output; coding relies on web-visible OSF search/file-list metadata plus related RP:P publication metadata. Claims are limited to surface metadata and do not invent file contents.
